## stdout // the big story
### Machine First: Why AEO Is Not SEO 2.0 *[dev_insight]* - This is an excerpt from my full article on AEO architecture. Answer systems don't rank, they infer. That requires a fundamentally different approach to how we build entity signals, structured data and content. Search engines optimize for ranking signals.

## stdout // the big story
### How I Use Claude to Build Full-Stack Apps in Under 4 Hours (The Complete Workflow) *[dev_insight]* - How I Use Claude to Build Full-Stack Apps in Under 4 Hours — The Complete Workflow Three months ago, I spent 3 weeks building a SaaS dashboard. Last week, I built a more complex one in 3 hours and 42 minutes —
